LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.label: Armor Meltdown
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.description: This person's armor is melting down due to extreme heat.
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.1.label: minor
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.2.label: moderate
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.3.label: serious
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.LBD_DRM_ArmorMeltdown.stages.5.label: completely melted
LanguageData.LBD_Angry_Bluefire.label: True Power
LanguageData.LBD_Angry_Bluefire.description: Good news: The head has not been damaged, the breath is currently at its strongest!
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Regeneration.label: Super-regeneration
LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Regeneration.description: Miraboreasu's body is composed of some supernatural force. As long as there is some rest time, all damage will be automatically healed.
LanguageData.LBD_DragonLanceStab.label: Dragonator Wound
LanguageData.LBD_DragonLanceStab.labelNoun: a wound left by a Dragonator pierce.
LanguageData.LBD_DragonLanceStab.description: A wound left by a Dragonator pierce.
LanguageData.LBD_Need_LBD_BlackDragon_Change.label: Flame Breath
